info.prompt:
anime art of anime art of a young South Asian girl with a slim, delicate frame standing beneath the soft glow of a moonlit evening, dressed in an elegant emerald-green lehenga adorned with intricate gold threadwork and delicate floral embroidery. The rich fabric flows gracefully around her, catching the light with a subtle shimmer, while a sheer ivory dupatta edged with golden lace drapes gently over her shoulders and trails behind her in the breeze.

Her medium-light brown skin glows softly against the deep jewel tones of her attire. Long, silky black hair cascades freely down her back, its smooth strands reflecting the ambient light. Her oval-shaped face is framed by delicate features, thin arched brows, and large expressive eyes behind round spectacles that lend her a gentle, intelligent charm. A serene expression rests on her lips, conveying quiet confidence and timeless grace.

Elegant pearl-and-gold jhumkas sway beside her cheeks, complemented by delicate bangles crafted from ivory enamel and gold accents. Around her neck rests a refined traditional pendant that enhances the regal beauty of the ensemble without overwhelming its simplicity.

The background is filled with softly glowing lanterns and dreamy bokeh lights, creating a magical atmosphere. The emerald fabric contrasts beautifully with the warm golden illumination, making every fold, embroidery pattern, and jewelry detail stand out with exceptional clarity. The scene captures a perfect balance of sophistication, cultural elegance, and youthful beauty.

world-class masterpiece, ultra-detailed anime illustration, emerald green and ivory color palette, luxurious lehenga design, cinematic lighting, highly detailed eyes, flowing hair, intricate embroidery, elegant jewelry, magical atmosphere, soft depth of field, breathtaking composition, vibrant colors, 4k, best quality, anime art, masterpiece, award-winning illustration, aesthetically stunning, exceptional attention to detail.
, world-class masterpiece, 4k, best quality, anime art.

Overall, it's an absolute world-class masterpiece anime-inspired artwork. It's an aesthetically pleasing anime art with impeccable attention to detail and beautiful composition.
